certificate.description: The DataLocker, Inc. Sentry 5 Encrypted USB Flash Drive is a hardware cryptographic module designed for organizations that require a secure way to store and transfer portable data. The stored data is secured by hardware-based 256-bit AES on-the-fly encryption to guard sensitive information in case the drive is lost or stolen. Its strong, durable, metal casing provides robust physical protection. Its strong password rules and lock-down control protects against brute force attacks.
